title: Repair corroded vehicle body panels and components
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Repair corroded vehicle body panels and components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to repair corroded panel sections

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Repair material is selected and checked for quality1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.5 Work is planned to identify repair methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Repair material is selected and checked for quality1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.5 Work is planned to identify repair methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Repair material is selected and checked for quality1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.5 Work is planned to identify repair methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to repair corroded panel sections

elements.title: Remove corroded sections

pcs.text: Corroded vehicle body panel and components are identified2.2 Body section is assessed to determine appropriate repair method2.3 Corroded panel is removed according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to vehicle or components2.4 Assistance is sought from authorised personnel where removal of components disturbs vehicle trim or electrical, mechanical or air conditioning systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Corroded vehicle body panel and components are identified2.2 Body section is assessed to determine appropriate repair method2.3 Corroded panel is removed according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to vehicle or components2.4 Assistance is sought from authorised personnel where removal of components disturbs vehicle trim or electrical, mechanical or air conditioning systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Corroded vehicle body panel and components are identified2.2 Body section is assessed to determine appropriate repair method2.3 Corroded panel is removed according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to vehicle or components2.4 Assistance is sought from authorised personnel where removal of components disturbs vehicle trim or electrical, mechanical or air conditioning systems.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Remove corroded sections

elements.title: Reform and replace corroded sections

pcs.text: Repair material is selected according to vehicle manufacturer specifications3.2 Corroded panel section is measured and formed use forming equipment3.3 Panel section is repaired or reformed using approved methods and equipment 3.4 Repaired corroded section is replaced, welded and finished3.5 Replaced section is checked for compliance against vehicle manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Repair material is selected according to vehicle manufacturer specifications3.2 Corroded panel section is measured and formed use forming equipment3.3 Panel section is repaired or reformed using approved methods and equipment 3.4 Repaired corroded section is replaced, welded and finished3.5 Replaced section is checked for compliance against vehicle manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Repair material is selected according to vehicle manufacturer specifications3.2 Corroded panel section is measured and formed use forming equipment3.3 Panel section is repaired or reformed using approved methods and equipment 3.4 Repaired corroded section is replaced, welded and finished3.5 Replaced section is checked for compliance against vehicle manufacturer specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Reform and replace corroded sections

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and panel is presented ready for painting 4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored4.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and panel is presented ready for painting 4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored4.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and panel is presented ready for painting 4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored4.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
